MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-22-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court vacates its tentative ruling.

Ruling: PLAINTIFF HUI ZHOU MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is taken off calendar at the moving parties' request. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories, Sets No. One, Inspection Demands, Set No. One, And To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John C. Won, Esq. or Craddick, Candland & Conti, Tel. 925.838.1100, appearing by CourtCall for Defendants UC Regents and Lukejohn Day, M.D.;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Defendant stipulated to this matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein.

There being no other appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted: Defendants' U.C. Regents and Lukejohn Day, M.D.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories, Sets No. One, Inspection Demands, Set No. One, And To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition is unopposed and granted. The plaintiff shall provide verified responses, without objection, to plaintiffs' Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production Of Documents, within twenty days of service of a copy of this Order with Notice of Entry. Plaintiff's deposition shall be held no later than sixty days of service of this Order with Notice of Entry, or on such other date as counsel shall agree. Defense counsel is to prepare a form or order and submit it to Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: J. Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (D302/JPT/RBU)
